textByHashes.1cd81b8a33845cb0eea96056db4e20344143041f: Well I suppose you have been a friend to Shayzien in the past, and this does sound serious.
textByHashes.02a07fb0a6c2a928c9f430bcd25619aab51d63cd: Very well citizen. I will depart soon.
textByHashes.c15d8019b5450314eaa02464e0198b7145d8a255: I will depart for Xeric's Lookout soon, citizen. I have a few things I need to do first.
textByHashes.50a2ddd1d5b7b0cc3f36793f9077ab8075939b48: Since when did Lady Piscarilius care for the people? Last I checked, your citizens lived in constant squalor.
textByHashes.c84cbe31d5ce519c5abb6a31f2cb595ee854523f: Well if you really do care for the people, surely a monarch is perfect. They're crying out for one right now.
textByHashes.493a90f48caa8045cf76911148bf68fba9eb6ee3: You would see us rule together?
textByHashes.ff5771c9628caf3de2ee3c81bc498149f629a364: We have to. There is no other option.
textByHashes.f439d1aac19f81917e764484e882b63c3cee4ee4: Ah, there you are citizen. There's something I need to discuss with you.
textByHashes.f42eff6b576b95eed8bf84322986f5c7db80ad97: Correct, citizen. Once the Council are removed from power, we will need a new ruler. I for one think this Royal Accord is the perfect move.
textByHashes.9299f7a92efa402e10c79ca3ccbc3c6b4d04f6c6: I think we can also agree that when the times comes, I will be a suitable candidate to rule. These are unstable times. My military leadership will put me in a good position to take over.
textByHashes.c290b8927bd2a13ba09fe542ce674b3a948e9040: I've no doubt they'll consider me a strong contender. That said, I expect Lord Hosidius will also be considered. On that note, there's a job I have that would be perfect for one with your skills.
textByHashes.84262967008bc79b563ba39462f395b88aec32a3: Before we come to finalise this Royal Accord, we need to be sure that everyone is in a place where they can pick the right ruler.
textByHashes.80c741b4534dc1bf67fa25c3450dffcd08266204: While Lord Hosidius seems like a good man for the job, I've recently obtained some intelligence that could suggest otherwise. I'd like you to look into this.
textByHashes.f039b10bd7829bddcb01437d5db521a41740d089: Some of my best people have been looking into the disappearance of Phileas Rimor and King Shayzien VII's journal. We now believe we have located both.
textByHashes.3d316b8eb3d8bdf0ac3ffb34b208c0a2dfe319ef: That's right. Is there a problem, citizen?
textByHashes.072b87f4c03f9376bd53aab90b5a3df6b4c183d7: Very well... I will personally see to the rescue of Phileas. I need you to recover the journal.
textByHashes.3f1e64a973f86f27583fbbfd1a9b4227ccb1996c: That it is, citizen. If our intelligence is to be believed, Lord Hosidius is now in possession of the journal.
textByHashes.12899cd1baa05b14f9dbcf84046bde5c486d48be: That I don't know, citizen. Lord Hosidius is meant to be an ally to Shayzien. After all, he's married to my sister.
textByHashes.540ad95620398b11b6fb0228c5730119b1b6fac1: Perhaps this is some plot of his to grow his influence. He may wish to use the journal to discredit my family. Regardless, I need you to retrieve it. Only then will we be able to determine the truth.
textByHashes.3c49325abbe69034aba1dbab74b4e8992c6bca44: Apparently he has a private office hidden below the Hosidius Vinery. That will likely be where he's keeping it. You'll need to go there, find out how to enter this office and then recover the journal.
textByHashes.8b272ab8d1c2520dd1bce3eeffb39d96a878883d: Hello there citizen. Have you found that journal?
textByHashes.6726f3c03fc3a5d608d18a57b52f482796e4a2f6: It's critical that you do so, as soon as possible. It will likely be in Lord Hosidius' hidden office below the Hosidius Vinery.
textByHashes.292344219729a0a28b81877ddfb8e59cf9cb1bf6: Hello there, citizen. Have you found that journal?
textByHashes.d618aa447efb188577a7917e7a42a9feae32708a: Not to worry, I should be able to take care of that. When the time comes to finalise the Royal Accord, I will have the information we need to decide upon a new ruler.
textByHashes.1a49128c9c63a871b458bd196a6c958d3d605cfe: Hello there, citizen. Thank you for your help earlier. I am ready to support this Royal Accord!
textByHashes.f1ec1e05da7d68910fa9e986b5e8521696073704: Well... I think the Royal Accord of Twill is a good starting point, but we'll need to make some changes for it to work.
textByHashes.74e81f94f1bc27cec1402660f6552030dbc25cc0: Lady Piscarilius wants the support of the people. Right now, they cry for a king. That means whoever takes the throne should take on the title of king or queen.
textByHashes.b48d06c22e1e52378323388afaa54c6037a43997: I also feel the act of transferring rulership from one house to the next - as in the original Accord - isn't going to work for us. What we need is consistency.
textByHashes.df168d062b4c25359d8d28f332218f4beff5151f: Err... No, I don't think that would be wise.
textByHashes.5c0fab754f4d81a4129fe7e02acfa51497af08e7: I don't feel I would be best placed for it. It would be better if I kept my focus on the important task of protecting Kourend.
textByHashes.c5a4dacf0cb4b829ad8ba38f12e534bac7d743ae: I suggest we make Lord Hosidius the new ruler of Kourend.
textByHashes.8ff8915e4c2fba0be72aeae23fb7b6eed04c5001: Well... It was a complex choice, citizen. I wouldn't worry about it. We're all ready to deal with the Council. Let's focus on that.
textByHashes.e918db9722c1cb2b9699fe215e1f0b5344529408: Stand down, Captain Rachelle. This situation is now under my command.
textByHashes.b319e1a5aba134682dab0680ce8e3f1233adc8d0: These citizens are to be protected. Ensure they do not enter the castle, but do not allow any harm to come to them.
textByHashes.b4eec4d5fbbc083c49e11db14d66c1d26c06d1e3: Thank you, Captain. Now, myself and the other leaders will go and speak with the councillors. This situation will be resolved soon.
textByHashes.6ecbcceea2436fa55b46daa69425ebac9f6fb1db: That would be one way to describe it Councillor. Lord Hosidius.
textByHashes.22584d65ecfbb7489b94b5e058546278cdcf29cf: For the crimes of murder and high treason. Along with the now-deceased Liam Orson and Sophia Hughes, the two of you successfully conspired to murder King Kharedst IV and Crown Princess Rose.
textByHashes.d4be15d8306f7c189981b6703e2235d86f2c603e: Quite right. Quidamortem is a dangerous place and I don't want to be ordering my troops on any unnecessary rescue missions.
textByHashes.055088154af7e1d941db60c4ad110996a8b0076e: So, tell me about your research.
textByHashes.abb31454b153356d9a17c48496e83efbbce8f0b0: Fair enough. I will approve your research, on one condition.
textByHashes.6060e1e4d283bc9f7235c789fba32d9581fb4037: If you discover anything, you will bring it to me first. King Shayzien VII was my ancestor and I want to be made aware of any discoveries that would present him in a bad light.
textByHashes.aed9a92fc65192d3b51d2378ca22dc942c6b58d2: They will be made aware. But only after I have reviewed the discoveries first.
textByHashes.634fc7c03763a4555f197df0ba42d2be7caabb2d: Excellent. Consider your research approved. If you require assistance with your work, I'd recommend talking to Historian Duffy on Quidamortem. He's been researching the mountain for a while.
textByHashes.a6b9cfe68c5057c4f7b4699a932839b599305fd0: Well if you require assistance, I'd recommend talking to Historian Duffy on Quidamortem. He's been researching the mountain for a while.
textByHashes.dffbb88354eb6e68049186d73319b117880972bd: How is your research going citizen?
textByHashes.7e9713c3ab68fa0c5c4140e7b0924cbed67a83a2: You believe they were the creation of my ancestor?
textByHashes.f06158eb9b016c106cbd6c9778735daf2bbc7f3c: So you claim. However, you never actually told me where this evidence came from.
textByHashes.f9f1514de9642b7529f408644710c0fd5af54cca: A parcel? King Shayzien VII's journal was delivered in a parcel? Who sent it?
textByHashes.16579ccd4251f0ee055c944367d3aeef5e76a0f7: Well you need to find out. Go to Phileas Rimor and retrieve this parcel. I need to see it for myself.
textByHashes.ffba31d57045317de18151dc86405cb4724c4ca2: Do you have the parcel citizen?
textByHashes.db15132efb7d76552a39444eec104e06b6ae1d81: Well go and fetch it then. I need to see it for myself.
textByHashes.2578bbfece69c0c70e8b9ea185c538ca160d8ebc: I'll open an investigation into this immediately. Hopefully we can find out what happened to Phileas.
textByHashes.aaeb85d4ea1260f2c3358b7fb652f6957c49edec: I'm afraid that without that parcel we don't have anything to link King Shayzien VII to your discoveries.
textByHashes.3fb469b698cd844887ee2fac4c6de9a962f461de: However, the rest of your research is still valid. I'll contact the research team on the mountain and make sure their discoveries are documented in the Arceuus Library.
textByHashes.c345107960984d0828402af84314570c62f12db4: You've done enough for now citizen. I'll be in touch if we require your assistance again. For now, here is payment for your time.
textByHashes.41e4ac6ef6879191aed77be1070e880359e4cb47: Well citizen, you are speaking to Lord Shiro Shayzien. I am the ruler of Shayzien and the commander-in-chief of the Shayzien Army.
textByHashes.53a79a2413f52901dc0cb01439b242d97d48654a: Since my father passed away four years ago. He was a good man who took the defence of Kourend very seriously. I have been working hard to continue his legacy.
textByHashes.2c9d43a7aa2232cacb45d825f7efc575736908c6: Anything else I can help you with citizen?
textByHashes.415f4b32c46a94aa34d18e50a89eba773b7862d2: Most citizens of Shayzien are part of the Shayzien Army in some form or other. We are responsible for defending Kourend against external and internal threats.
textByHashes.0c71ee3c2b388c13c145629ed7f31af12a968d89: Externally, we have recently being dealing with increased lizardman activity. We've also been keeping a close eye on Varlamore to the south, just in case they try anything.
textByHashes.690214216c92ba507aa3e0432d25aaaeb74c2d1a: Internally, we have seen a rise in gang crime across the kingdom. It seems to be especially prevalent in Port Piscarilius.
textByHashes.b7c506492e7bd5a513865a40fe6cd9728f1c4246: By doing what we do best citizen. There's no threat that can't be defeated by a Shayzien soldier with a sword in their hand.
textByHashes.c6b545f8508b16a56391cb9fc5281ca6f4a0ecf8: Our war plans? I'm afraid most of that is confidential.
textByHashes.1a0cf18e64a7ed6a0c68c6fe8415fb2c72bfd058: What I can tell you is that our main focus right now is the lizardman threat. We've moved a great number of troops into the Kebos Lowlands to combat the issue.
textByHashes.5703b72362020f04cd368dcb07b5b9445bb173cd: Absolutely, we've pushed the lizardmen back to the point where we're finally able to allow citizens such as yourself into the region.
textByHashes.512a9e0432b468074f1d6129741e79b5875a4813: Apart from the lizardman, we are also preparing to support the King in the hunt for his father's killer. Once we know who they are, they will face the full might of the Shayzien Army.
textByHashes.ee46053d53653758ea90de0e2f4b2add50be417c: Can't talk right now citizen. I'm very busy.
textByHashes.ed4b0031a80c37a2297a79319cfaed0d6cf1ad82: Here citizen. Your reward for helping with the expedition.
